info.brief_description: One day while Bart had detention and Lisa was home with just Maggie, Milhouse came over.
info.description:
The rating is because Maggie slowly starts doing inappropriate things around Milhouse as her crush on him turns into a sexual crush on him

This story is the aftermath of Milhouse getting tired of helping Bart with pranks and Lisa's rejection even if he sometimes just wants to talk to her.
